name: todo-app-html
description: 1. Download mongodb from Homebrew with -> `brew tap mongodb/brew` 2. Update Homebrew `brew update` 3. Install mongodb from the downloaded tab `brew install mongodb-community@5.0` 4. Start mongodb `brew services start mongodb-community@5.0` 5. Stop mongodb ` brew services stop mongodb-community@5.0` 6. To see the what brew is running `brew services list`
